meta.content: Shokher Bikewala — premium bike accessories. Helmets, gloves, jackets, lights and more. Cash on delivery across Bangladesh.
meta.name: description

head.b:skin: /* Blogger-required skin block (kept minimal — real styles above) */ body { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; }

header.class: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-40 transition-all duration-300

div.class: glass rounded-full pl-3 pr-2 sm:pl-5 sm:pr-3 py-1.5 sm:py-2 flex items-center gap-3 sm:gap-4

a.class: flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/15 to-primary/5 border border-primary/20 p-1 flex items-center justify-center

span.class: font-head text-[13px] lg:text-sm font-bold text-fg tracking-wide
font-head text-[9px] lg:text-[10px] font-bold text-primary tracking-[0.32em]

nav.class: hidden lg:flex items-center justify-center flex-1 gap-1

a.class: sb-nav-link relative px-3.5 py-2 text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-fg-muted hover:text-fg
sb-nav-link relative px-3.5 py-2 text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-fg-muted hover:text-fg
sb-nav-link relative px-3.5 py-2 text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-fg-muted hover:text-fg
sb-nav-link relative px-3.5 py-2 text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-fg-muted hover:text-fg
sb-nav-link relative px-3.5 py-2 text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-fg-muted hover:text-fg

form.class: hidden md:flex items-center bg-surface-soft border border-line rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 w-56 lg:w-64

input.name: q
input.class: flex-1 bg-transparent text-sm placeholder:text-fg-soft text-fg outline-none

div.class: flex items-center gap-1.5 sm:gap-2 ml-auto lg:ml-0

button.class: w-9 h-9 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-soft border border-line text-fg-muted hover:text-primary hover:border-primary/40

a.class: hidden sm:inline-flex w-9 h-9 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-soft border border-line text-fg-muted hover:text-primary hover:border-primary/40

button.class: lg:hidden w-9 h-9 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-soft border border-line text-fg-muted

div.class: absolute right-3 top-3 bottom-3 w-[78vw] max-w-xs glass rounded-3xl p-5 pt-16 overflow-y-auto
absolute top-4 left-5 right-5 flex items-center gap-2.5
w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/15 to-primary/5 border border-primary/20 p-1

button.class: ml-auto w-8 h-8 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-soft border border-line

a.class: block px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl text-base font-head font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-muted hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary
block px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl text-base font-head font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-muted hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary
block px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl text-base font-head font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-muted hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary
block px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl text-base font-head font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-muted hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary
block px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl text-base font-head font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-muted hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary
block px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl text-base font-head font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-muted hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary

div.class: relative max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-10 sm:py-16 grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-10 items-center

span.class: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-primary/10 border border-primary/30 text-primary text-xs font-bold tracking-wider uppercase

h1.class: text-3xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-display font-extrabold leading-[1.05] tracking-tight

div.p: Helmets, gloves, jackets, lights and exhaust systems for every Bangladeshi rider. Cash on delivery nationwide.

a.class: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl bg-primary text-white font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/25 hover:bg-primary-600 transition min-h-[48px]
inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white font-bold transition min-h-[48px]

div.class: aspect-square rounded-3xl glass overflow-hidden border border-line p-6 flex items-center justify-center

p.class: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-primary mb-1

a.class: hidden sm:inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-bold text-primary

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-3 sm:gap-4

p.class: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-primary mb-1

a.class: hidden sm:inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-bold text-primary

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-5
max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center

p.class: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-primary mb-2

div.p: Shokher Bikewala curates premium, road-tested bike accessories — from full-face helmets to LED kits — and delivers nationwide with cash on delivery. We obsess over fit, finish and price so every ride feels just a little better.

div.class: grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 sm:gap-6 mt-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto

p.class: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-primary mb-1

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-5

p.class: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-primary mb-1

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-5

article.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

div.class: aspect-square rounded-2xl overflow-hidden glass border border-line grid place-items-center p-4
flex items-center gap-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-soft

h1.class: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-display font-extrabold leading-tight

div.class: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-500/10 text-green-600 text-xs font-bold

a.class: flex-1 inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white font-bold min-h-[52px]
inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl bg-primary hover:bg-primary-600 text-white font-bold min-h-[52px]

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-10 grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8
w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/15 to-primary/5 border border-primary/20 p-1

div.p: Premium bike accessories with cash on delivery across Bangladesh.

p.class: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-fg-soft mb-3

a.class: text-fg-muted hover:text-primary
text-fg-muted hover:text-primary
text-fg-muted hover:text-primary
text-fg-muted hover:text-primary

a.class: w-9 h-9 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-bg border border-line hover:border-primary/40 hover:text-primary text-fg-muted

w-9 h-9 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-bg border border-line hover:border-primary/40 hover:text-primary text-fg-muted
w-9 h-9 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-bg border border-line hover:border-primary/40 hover:text-primary text-fg-muted

div.class: border-t border-line py-4 text-center text-xs text-fg-soft

a.class: fixed bottom-5 right-4 z-30 w-14 h-14 grid place-items-center rounded-full bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white shadow-lg shadow-green-500/30 transition
